name: openehr-bridge
description: OpenEHR Bridge — Autonomous Healthcare Workflow Engine

scripts.dev: npm run dev --workspace=apps/api & npm run dev --workspace=apps/web
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace=packages/shared && npm run build --workspace=apps/api && npm run build --workspace=apps/web
scripts.lint: npm run lint --workspace=apps/api && npm run lint --workspace=apps/web
